_metadata.purpose: Product workspace settings. DS plugin install 透過 `/plugin marketplace add` + `/plugin install` CLI(per Anthropic plugin docs code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins),不在 settings.json 寫 enabledPlugins。
consumerSetup: /plugin update design-system  # bump to new version
_metadata.createdBy: team-distribution-roadmap Phase 5 template(2026-05-22 / 23 ship)— corrected per real Anthropic plugin spec 2026-05-23

_managedSettings_note: 若需要強制 marketplace allowlist + 阻擋 user-level skill override(team-wide policy),用 managed settings:strictKnownMarketplaces + strictPluginOnlyCustomization。詳 code.claude.com/docs/en/settings
